titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 199: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 199. (A.R. No. 244 of 1926.) KĪḺAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAIYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the shrine, Vaṭamūlēśvara temple.

This records an endowment of land after bringing it under cultivation at Vēṭṭamguḍi, a dēvadāna village, for the provision of offerings of rice, vegetables, curd and ghee on the day of uttarāyaṇa-saṅkranti to god Tiruvālanduṟai-Mahādēva (in the temple) and of parched rice, coconut and sugar to Gaṇapati on the day of Tiruvōṇam in Paṅguni month, by Māṟapirāṉ Nambi, the śrīkāryam (of the temple), (Cf. S.I.I., Vol. V No. 675.)
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 406.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koppara
kecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu pa
tinnāṟāvatu It tiruvāla
mtuṟai mādevaṟkku Utti
raayaṉa saṅkirān=ti potu
tiruvamutukku Arici kuttal
Ayṅkuṟuṇiyum neyyamutu
nāḻiyum tayiramutu kuṟuṇiyu
m kaṟiyamutum gaṇapatiyār
kku paṅkuṉit tiruvoṇatti
ṉāṉṟu Aval Amutu tū
ṇiyum teṅkāy pattum
caṟkkarai patiṉpalamum
Ittaṉaikkumāka devatāṉam
veṭṭam(k)kuṭi vaṉṉiccey mayak
ki cantirātittavaṟ ceyvittāṉ
śrī kāriyamārāñca māṟapirā ṉa
mpiyeṉ Itu panmāheśvara
rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 199 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
